# Copilot Instructions for az-scout-plugin-bdd-sku

## Project overview

`az-scout-plugin-bdd-sku` is an **az-scout plugin** — a lightweight HTTP client that proxies all requests to the standalone [az-scout-bdd-api](https://github.com/rsabile/az_scout_bdd_api) REST API. It provides 24 MCP tools, a settings UI, and a data-exploration tab for Azure VM SKU pricing, spot eviction, and availability data.

**This plugin contains NO database code, NO ingestion logic, and NO infrastructure.** It is purely a UI + MCP client.

## Tech stack

- **Backend:** Python 3.11+, FastAPI (APIRouter), requests (HTTP client)
- **Frontend:** Vanilla JavaScript (no framework), CSS custom properties (dark/light themes)
- **Packaging:** hatchling + hatch-vcs, CalVer (`YYYY.MM.MICRO`), src-layout
- **Tools:** uv (package manager), ruff (lint + format), mypy (strict), pytest

## Project structure

```
src/az_scout_bdd_sku/
├── __init__.py          # BddSkuPlugin class (get_router, get_mcp_tools, get_tabs, get_static_dir)
├── api_client.py        # HTTP client → standalone API (requests.get, _get helper, ApiNotConfiguredError)
├── plugin_config.py     # PluginConfig, DatabaseConfig (unused/legacy), api_base_url management
├── plugin_routes.py     # FastAPI routes: GET /status, GET/PUT /settings, POST /settings/test
├── tools.py             # 24 MCP tool functions (all delegate to api_client via _safe_call)
├── _version.py          # Auto-generated by hatch-vcs (do not edit)
└── static/
    ├── css/bdd-sku.css
    ├── html/bdd-sku-tab.html
    └── js/bdd-sku-tab.js
openapi/
└── v1.yaml              # Reference copy of the API spec (source of truth is in az-scout-bdd-api)
tests/
├── test_bdd_sku.py      # Plugin route tests (mocked api_client)
└── test_openapi_exists.py  # Validates openapi/v1.yaml existence and YAML validity
```

## Architecture

```
┌─────────────────────┐       HTTP        ┌──────────────────────┐       SQL       ┌────────────┐
│  az-scout-plugin    │ ───────────────▶  │  az-scout-bdd-api    │ ─────────────▶  │ PostgreSQL │
│  (this repo)        │                   │  (standalone API)    │                 │            │
│  MCP tools + UI     │                   │  FastAPI + psycopg   │                 │            │
└─────────────────────┘                   └──────────────────────┘                 └────────────┘
```

- **Plugin** → lightweight HTTP proxy client
- **API** → standalone REST API with PostgreSQL (separate repo)
- **Ingestion** → batch jobs that populate the database (separate repo)

## Code conventions

- **Python:** All functions must have type annotations (`disallow_untyped_defs = true`). Follow ruff rules: `E, F, I, W, UP, B, SIM`. Line length is 100.
- **JavaScript:** Vanilla JS only — no npm, no bundler, no frameworks. Use `const`/`let` (never `var`). Functions and variables use `camelCase`.
- **CSS:** Use CSS custom properties for theming. Support both light and dark themes using `[data-theme="dark"]` selectors.

## Plugin API

The plugin class (`BddSkuPlugin`) in `__init__.py` implements the `AzScoutPlugin` protocol:

| Method | Returns | Purpose |
|---|---|---|
| `get_router()` | `APIRouter` | Routes mounted at `/plugins/bdd-sku/` |
| `get_mcp_tools()` | `list[Callable]` (24 tools) | MCP tools registered on az-scout MCP server |
| `get_static_dir()` | `Path` | Static assets at `/plugins/bdd-sku/static/` |
| `get_tabs()` | `list[TabDefinition]` | "BDD SKU" tab in main app |

### Entry point

```toml
[project.entry-points."az_scout.plugins"]
bdd_sku = "az_scout_bdd_sku:plugin"
```

## Configuration

The API base URL can be set via (in priority order):

1. **Settings UI** — `PUT /plugins/bdd-sku/settings` (persisted to `~/.config/az-scout/bdd-sku.toml`)
2. **Environment variable** — `BDD_SKU_API_URL`
3. **TOML config file** — `~/.config/az-scout/bdd-sku.toml` (`[api] base_url = "..."`)

## MCP tools reference

All 24 tools are thin wrappers over `api_client.py` HTTP calls. Each catches `ApiNotConfiguredError` and returns a structured error if the API URL is not set.

### Legacy tools

| Tool | Description |
|---|---|
| `cache_status` | DB health, row counts, regions, SKUs, last runs |
| `get_spot_eviction_rates` | Cached spot eviction rates (region, sku, job filters) |
| `get_spot_price_history` | Cached spot price history (region, sku, os_type filters) |
| `get_spot_eviction_history` | List available eviction rate snapshots |

### V1 tools — Data exploration

| Tool | Description |
|---|---|
| `v1_status` | DB health, row counts, last job per dataset |
| `v1_list_locations` | Distinct Azure locations across all tables |
| `v1_list_skus` | Distinct VM SKU names (optional search) |
| `v1_retail_prices` | Retail VM prices with filters |
| `v1_eviction_rates` | Spot eviction rates with filters |
| `v1_eviction_rates_latest` | Latest eviction rate per (region, sku) |
| `v1_sku_catalog` | Full VM SKU catalog (search, category, family, vCPUs) |

### V1 tools — Pricing analytics

| Tool | Description |
|---|---|
| `v1_pricing_categories` | Distinct pricing categories from price summaries |
| `v1_pricing_summary` | Pre-aggregated price summaries (avg, median, min, max, percentiles) |
| `v1_pricing_summary_latest` | Latest price summary snapshot |
| `v1_pricing_summary_series` | Time-bucketed pricing metric evolution |
| `v1_pricing_cheapest` | Top N cheapest regions by pricing metric |
| `v1_pricing_summary_compare` | Compare pricing across multiple regions |

### V1 tools — Spot & savings

| Tool | Description |
|---|---|
| `v1_spot_prices_series` | Spot price time series (day/week/month buckets) |
| `v1_spot_detail` | Composite: latest price + eviction rate + SKU catalog |
| `v1_retail_prices_compare` | Compare SKU retail price across all regions |
| `v1_savings_plans` | Retail prices with savings plan data |

### V1 tools — Operations

| Tool | Description |
|---|---|
| `v1_jobs` | Ingestion job runs (dataset, status filters) |
| `v1_job_logs` | Log entries for a specific job run |
| `v1_stats` | Global dashboard stats (counts, freshness) |

## Testing patterns

- Tests use FastAPI's `TestClient` (backed by httpx).
- `api_client` functions are mocked with `unittest.mock.patch`.
- OpenAPI spec validity is tested by parsing `openapi/v1.yaml` with PyYAML.
- Run with: `uv run pytest`

## Quality checks

```bash
uv run ruff check src/ tests/
uv run ruff format --check src/ tests/
uv run mypy src/
uv run pytest
```

## Design constraints

### Do

- Keep all API calls in `api_client.py` — tools and routes must not make HTTP calls directly.
- Keep MCP tools as thin wrappers over `api_client` functions.
- Include full type annotations on all functions.
- Support both light and dark themes.
- Use `_safe_call()` in `tools.py` to catch errors consistently.

### Do NOT

- Do NOT add database code, SQL, or psycopg to this plugin.
- Do NOT add ingestion logic, collectors, or batch jobs.
- Do NOT add infrastructure (Terraform, Docker, bicep).
- Do NOT introduce frontend frameworks, npm, or build tooling.
- Do NOT introduce global mutable state.
- Do NOT import heavy modules at plugin import time (use lazy imports).

## Related repositories

| Repository | Purpose |
|---|---|
| [az-scout](https://github.com/lrivallain/az-scout) | Core application (plugin host) |
| [az-scout-bdd-api](https://github.com/rsabile/az_scout_bdd_api) | Standalone REST API (PostgreSQL) |
| [az-scout-bdd-ingestion](https://github.com/rsabile/az-scout-bdd-ingestion) | Ingestion pipelines + infrastructure |

## Versioning

- Version is derived from git tags via `hatch-vcs` — never hardcode a version.
- `_version.py` is auto-generated and excluded from linting.
- Tags follow CalVer: `v2026.2.0`, `v2026.2.1`, etc.
